prompts.card:
Bright chibi/Q-version mobile RPG card art for original Three Kingdoms inspired generals, big expressive glossy eyes, cute compact childlike proportions, oversized heads, small bodies, ornate helmets and exaggerated readable weapons, saturated vertical character-panel composition, no realistic adult proportions, no text, no logo, no watermark, no existing commercial game or anime likeness.
Original chibi Jiang Wei inspired Shu strategist-general, green-teal white and gold ornate armor, huge teal eyes, qilin-themed forked long spear, military scroll at waist, polished mobile RPG card source, no text.
No text. No logo. No watermark.
prompts.battle:
Bright chibi/Q-version mobile RPG card art for original Three Kingdoms inspired generals, big expressive glossy eyes, cute compact childlike proportions, oversized heads, small bodies, ornate helmets and exaggerated readable weapons, saturated vertical character-panel composition, no realistic adult proportions, no text, no logo, no watermark, no existing commercial game or anime likeness.
Transparent chibi battle cutout of the same Jiang Wei inspired warrior, full body centered, forked long spear silhouette readable, military scroll as physical prop, no glow or trails.
Transparent background for battle/action sources. Character body, clothing, hair, and weapon only. Do not bake glow, aura, trails, slash rectangles, square panels, text, logo, or watermark into base frames. Keep the active body centered in the frame with head and feet balanced around the center.
